title: Book your appointment
description: Book your psychological counseling session with {{name}}. Specialist in {{specialty}}.
reason: What would you like to work on?
completeReservation: To complete your reservation, please log in or create an account.
termsAcceptance: By continuing, you accept our terms and conditions
aboutToBook: You are about to book your appointment for <1>{{date}}</1> at <3>{{time}}</3>
verifyingPayment: Your payment will be verified and we will contact you to confirm

calendar.noSlotsDate: No slots available for this date.
calendar.noSlotsGeneral: No slots available at this moment.
calendar.therapistNoSchedule: The therapist has no schedule configured.
calendar.slotsBusy: All slots are taken or do not meet the minimum advance notice rule (10 hours).

form.name: Full Name
form.consentLabel: I accept the <1>Terms and Conditions</1> and authorize that for clinical supervision and service improvement purposes, some sessions may be observed live or recorded. Recording will only be done with your consent, will be confidential, exclusively for professional supervision and quality management, and will not be kept for more than 5 calendar days.
form.consentTooltip: We have a team of senior supervisors to support the care provided by our specialists.
form.promoCode: Do you have a promo code?

restricted.title: Restricted Access
restricted.description: This action is only available for patients. As a {{role}}, you cannot book appointments from this view.

errors.consentDesc: You must accept the Terms and Conditions to continue.
errors.slotTaken: Sorry, this slot has just been booked
errors.slotTakenDesc: Another user booked this slot while you were completing the form. Please choose another available slot.
errors.minAdvanceDesc: Appointments must be booked at least 10 hours in advance. Please choose another slot.
